postures.description: Not public-facing yet. May exist as working notes, screenshots, or discussion fragments.
Useful public-facing research posture, but not proof authority.
Reflects another repo's state. Does not create authority.
Public claim is tied to a receipt, formalism test, source stage, commit, or hash.
Stable public doctrine after review. Still points back to authority sources.
Retained for history only. Not current public posture.

claims.title: Site is a public mirror, not proof authority.
Transition Table exposes decision classes, consequence tiers, coupling blocks, proof posture, and formalism gaps.
StegVerse-002 core-lite intake is publicly mirrored as a governed work-entity status.

publication_gate: Classify the incoming information before public placement.
Name the authority source or mark the item as draft/research-note.
Never let Site assert proof that belongs to formalism-tests or a governed work-entity.
Use shared navigation and footer for public pages.
Mark stale claims deprecated rather than silently deleting public history.
